lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant mechanical repair. The exterior has extensive body damage, including rust and large dents. The interior is heavily worn with visible damage to the upholstery.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes. The interior is clean with light wear. It is mechanically sound and reliable.

Step into luxury with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It is in showroom condition, meticulously cared for, and looks and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line. From the flawless exterior to the spotless interior, this car is a rare find for a discerning collector or anyone who demands the very best. You won't find a single detail out of place – it's truly a gem!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The exterior is straight with only minor cosmetic imperfections, such as small stone chips, consistent with regular use. Mechanically, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts reliably. The interior is clean and well-preserved, with no major tears or stains in the upholstery. All essential electronics, including the climate control and infotainment system, are fully functional. This car is roadworthy and ready for daily driving, offering a dependable experience for its next owner with no immediate repairs required.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a reliable daily driver for someone who values utility. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the hood, and a few small dings. Inside, the upholstery is intact but displays visible wear and some minor staining. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives well, though it will eventually require some routine maintenance and likely a set of new tires. It is a straightforward, honest vehicle that is priced to reflect its current state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine interior that retains its original factory luster. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a showroom model, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure absolute operational integrity. For the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in peerless condition.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! It’s in truly pristine, showroom-quality condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for perfection without the brand-new sticker price, you've found it! I can't wait to find it a great new home—come take a look!

Offered is an investment-grade 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S, featuring the iconic wide-body silhouette and a 3.6L M96 flat-six engine. This specimen is mechanically superlative, with a proactively installed LN Engineering IMS bearing retrofit and a recently refreshed cooling system including a low-temp thermostat. Power is delivered through a G96 6-speed manual
Mint condition. Flawless original paint. Pristine interior. Full service history. Garage kept. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with original factory paint that is entirely free of chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Every body line is laser-straight, reflecting its history as a strictly climate-controlled, garage-kept masterpiece. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of any wear or creasing, and the interior still retains its original fresh scent. All electronic components, including the infotainment and driver-assist systems, operate with factory-fresh precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having been maintained exclusively by certified technicians with a complete, documented service history. The engine and transmission provide a driving experience that is as smooth and responsive as the day it was first delivered. This is a rare, collector-grade example for a buyer who demands perfection without compromise.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no signs of wear, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. This is a rare acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection in both aesthetics and mechanical integrity.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards of excellence. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail reflects a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is. It’s been pampered since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! If you're looking for something that's practically brand new and drives like a dream, this is the one for you. Come take a look and fall in love!

This investment-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the iconic S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The mechanical integrity is superlative: the VANOS system has been proactively addressed, and the rear subframe is fully reinforced to handle the torque load. Power is managed via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut, with zero bushing deflection and factory-spec hydraulic steering feedback. This is a turn-key, showroom-quality example with a flawless service history and no mechanical compromises.
Pristine condition. One owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Full service records included. Smoke-free interior.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that defines the standard for 'mint' condition. This car has been meticulously garaged and maintained with an open checkbook, showing zero signs of wear. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like factory finish with no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, recently enhanced by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of creases, the carpets are pristine, and the original scent remains. Mechanically, it is flawless, featuring a complete service history from authorized dealerships and a whisper-quiet engine that performs exactly as it did on day one. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions perfectly. The undercarriage is as clean as the body, reflecting its sheltered life. Included with the sale are both original key fobs, the full set of owner’s manuals, and a documented history of its low-mileage journey. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new, suited for the most discerning enthusiast.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire an automotive specimen in impeccable, showroom-original condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with the utmost care, every detail of this motorcar reflects an uncompromising standard of excellence. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this vehicle satisfies the requirements of the most discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite you to experience a level of mechanical and aesthetic integrity that is increasingly difficult to secure in today’s market.

We are privileged to offer this exemplary specimen, presented in showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and reflecting an uncompromising standard of care, this vehicle represents a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning enthusiast. Every aspect of this automobile—from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior appointments—testifies to its distinguished provenance and superior mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly spectacular shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered its whole life, meticulously cared for, and is looking for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. You won't find a single flaw on this one. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love at first sight!
Presenting a museum-grade E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. This 3.2L inline-
Mint condition. Single owner. Garaged. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This vehicle is an absolute showroom-quality specimen, meticulously preserved by a single owner and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, and has been treated with a multi-year ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior retains its original factory scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the driver-assist features, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a complete, documented service history performed exclusively at the flagship dealership. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and performs exactly as it did the day it was delivered. Truly a collector-grade example for the most discerning buyer.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin that reflects meticulous stewardship. Every mechanical and aesthetic component has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for excellence. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless form.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of excellence. Every aesthetic detail and mechanical component reflects a level of care that transcends the ordinary, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition. We invite the discerning collector to appreciate this masterfully preserved example of engineering precision.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute pristine condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and there isn’t a single blemish to be found. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one this clean! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a collector-grade 2004 Porsche 911 Turbo featuring the legendary 3.6L Mezger flat-six engine. This powerhouse utilizes a true dry-sump lubrication system and twin-turbocharged induction to deliver relentless torque through a precise G96/50 6-speed manual transaxle. The mechanical integrity is absolute, with a viscous-clutch AWD system providing exceptional power distribution and Bilstein-tuned McPherson struts maintaining perfect chassis kinematics. Finished in a flawless coat with zero oxidation, the vehicle retains its factory-spec volumetric efficiency and boost pressure. Recent borescope inspection confirms pristine cylinder walls and optimal compression across all banks. This is a turn-key, high-performance icon for the discerning enthusiast who demands mechanical perfection.
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Clean title. Maintenance records included.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece, preserved in showroom condition since the day it was driven off the lot. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with zero imperfections, having been professionally ceramic-coated and strictly garage-kept. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, creases, or odors. Every button, switch, and technological feature functions exactly as it did on day one. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a meticulous service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a chassis that has never seen inclement weather, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the designation of 'mint.' This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with an interior that remains in showroom-grade condition. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that transcends the typical market offering. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery.
